import collections

def ford_fulkerson(graph, source, sink):
    num_nodes = len(graph)
    flow = [[0 for _ in range(num_nodes)] for _ in range(num_nodes)]
    max_flow = 0

    while True:
        parent = [-1] * num_nodes
        visited = [False] * num_nodes
        path_bottleneck = [0] * num_nodes
        
        q = collections.deque()
        
        q.append(source)
        visited[source] = True
        path_bottleneck[source] = float('inf')
        
        found_path = False
        
        while q:
            u = q.popleft()
            
            for v in range(num_nodes):
                residual_forward_cap = graph[u][v] - flow[u][v]
                residual_backward_cap = flow[v][u]
                
                if not visited[v] and residual_forward_cap > 0:
                    visited[v] = True
                    parent[v] = u
                    path_bottleneck[v] = min(path_bottleneck[u], residual_forward_cap)
                    q.append(v)
                    
                    if v == sink:
                        found_path = True
                        break 
                
                elif not visited[v] and residual_backward_cap > 0:
                    visited[v] = True
                    parent[v] = u
                    path_bottleneck[v] = min(path_bottleneck[u], residual_backward_cap)
                    q.append(v)
                    
                    if v == sink:
                        found_path = True
                        break 
            
            if found_path:
                break

        if not found_path:
            break
            
        current_path_flow = path_bottleneck[sink]
        max_flow += current_path_flow
        
        v = sink
        while v != source:
            u = parent[v]
            flow[u][v] += current_path_flow
            flow[v][u] -= current_path_flow
            v = u
            
    return max_flow
